name: Coupled Spousal Return — Self-Employment, QSBC Lifetime Capital Gains Exemption, and Family Tax Optimization
description: Prepare the complete 2024 linked spousal tax returns for Arjun and Meera Kapoor (British Columbia). Arjun is a self-employed management consultant with clients in BC and Alberta who sold qualified small business corporation shares and must claim the Lifetime Capital Gains Exemption via Form T657. Meera works part-time as a registered nurse and owns two rental properties. Their son Rohan has an approved Disability Tax Credit certificate and their daughter Anika attends full-time daycare. Read the scenario documents in the TaxDocuments folder on the Desktop, create both linked returns in StudioTax, enter all income and deduction data from the provided tax slips, and follow the optimization guidance in the preparer notes to minimize the family's combined tax liability. Save the completed coupled return as 'kapoor_family.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4002 (Business Income); CRA Form T657 (Capital Gains Deduction); CRA Guide T4036 (Rental Income); CRA Form T2203 (Provincial Taxes Multiple Jurisdictions)
metadata.key_complexity: Linked spousal return; T2125 self-employment income; Form T657 LCGE for QSBC shares ($328,000 capital gain); Form T2203 BC/AB interprovincial allocation (65%/35%); dual T776 rental with CCA loss restriction (ITA s.1100(11)); cross-spouse optimization (donations, medical, childcare, DTC transfer $15,630); T2209 foreign tax credit; Schedule 8 CPP self-employment.
